scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "green,cyan" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "green,cyan" "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
